notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Bobby Witt Jr. steals (24) 3rd base. Vinnie Pasquantino steals (3) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Tolbert GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Tolbert grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to first baseman Ezequiel Duran. Kameron Misner out at 3rd. Tyler Tolbert out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Tolbert rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Tolbert grounds into a double play, third baseman Josh Jung to first baseman Ezequiel Duran. Kameron Misner out at 3rd. Tyler Tolbert out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Corey Seager GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to pitcher Seth Lugo. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Corey Seager rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Corey Seager grounds into a double play, first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to pitcher Seth Lugo. Joc Pederson out at 2nd. Corey Seager out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran plunked
